genscalator

Forgy dark

tempered-iron purple ground · bone-white body · glow-orange headings

TokSpendSmartZone ColdStartRotVigilRacing

Body and links

The exit banks the fire; the fresh agent blows the warp ember back into flame. Read the design language — palette, contrast table and logo spec are all generated from one Scala source.

A raised surface in anvil-coal graphite. Inline code like tt forge sits on it.

Code

object Forge:
  val ember = bank(fire)     // survives the warp
  def morning = blow(ember)  // back into flame
HIO #ee582b
VRO #EE2400
CVRO #05b9e9
CHIO #11a7d4
VBG #38db4e
NPP #c724b1
genscalator

Smither light

bone-white ground · tempered-purple body · hot-iron rule · temper-blue links

TokSpendSmartZone ColdStartRotVigilRacing

Body and links

The exit banks the fire; the fresh agent blows the warp ember back into flame. Read the design language — palette, contrast table and logo spec are all generated from one Scala source.

A raised surface in cold gray. Inline code like tt forge inverts to the dark pair.

Code

object Forge:
  val ember = bank(fire)     // survives the warp
  def morning = blow(ember)  // back into flame
